title: Query on large string table fails on HEAPextend
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE large_strings(id INT, data TEXT);
INSERT INTO large_strings VALUES (1, CONCAT('a', REPEAT('b', 1000000)));
CREATE TABLE another_table(id INT, ref_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES large_strings(id));
key_bug_features: Query on large string table fails
